sourcePage: Visa requirements for Papua New Guinean citizens

Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Albania.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid multiple-entry Schengen, UK or US visa has been previously used once or residence permit of Schengen, UK, US or UAE 10 years..

Algeria.notes: Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days..

Andorra.notes: Andorra imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossings with France or Spain, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..

Argentina.notes: The AVE (High Speed Travel) is open to Papua New Guinean citizens holding valid, current ordinary passports traveling to Argentina for tourism. To do so, they must hold a valid category B2/J/B1/O/P (P1-P2-P3)/E/H-1B visa issued by the United States of America..

Australia and territories.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa).. Transit visa is not required..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR)..

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 30 days visa free if hold a valid multiple entry visa or resident permit of the European Union, Schengen Area member states, and United States.

Canada.notes: ETA required if arriving by air. On arrival from land or overseas..

China.notes: 24-hour visa-free transit through any international airports of China, allows domestic travel through different airports..

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period..

Costa Rica.notes: 90 days visa free if hold a valid, multiple-entry visa or residence permit issued by the European Union member states, EFTA member states, Canada, the United Kingdom or the United States.

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

El Salvador.notes: In cases where a visa cannot be issued due to unexpected circumstances or force majeure, visitors may apply for a visa through the Special Entry Permit (PEI).. 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

Equatorial Guinea.notes: Must arrive via Malabo International Airport.

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Guatemala.notes: 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

Honduras.notes: 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Japan.notes: Eligible for an e-Visa if residing in one these countries Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, India, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, Taiwan (Province of China), United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States..

Jordan.notes: Visa on arrival if they have a residence permit issued by any country of the European Union, any country of the Gulf Cooperation Council, Australia, Canada, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway, Switzerland or have a Permanent Resident Card (Green Card) issued by the US..

Kazakhstan.notes: Kazakhstan e-Visa E-Visa can be issued only if there is a valid invitation from the Kazakh side.. To apply for an e-Visa, you need an invitation number received from the inviting Kazakh side.. The issued electronic visa must be printed out for presentation at the state border crossing and on the territory of the Republic of Kazakhstan.. E-Visa gives the right to enter / exit the Republic of Kazakhstan only through the international airports of Astana and Almaty.. E-Visas are not issued to foreigners with whom children travel together...

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

South Korea.notes: Multiple-Entry Visa may be granted to who entered South Korea 4 or more times within the last 2 years, or 10 or more visits in total (one of those 10 visits should be within the last 2 years).. May apply online..

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa can be obtained for holders of a Residence Permit issued by a GCC member state under the following conditions:. To be 18 years old and over.. The residence permit for a GCC state must be valid for at least another 3 months.. To be accompanied by the sponsor of the residence permit if the sponsor is an individual.. Does not apply to holders of a GCC Student Visa and Non-Skilled Worker Visa.

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Lebanon.notes: In addition to a visa, an approval should be obtained from the Immigration department of the General Directorate of General Security (La Surete Generale)..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Mauritius.notes: 180 days per calendar year for tourism visits and a maximum stay of 120 days per calendar year for business visits..

Mexico.notes: 180 days visa free if hold both a valid visa or permanent residence issued by Canada, Schengen Area, Japan, the United Kingdom or the United States, and only permanent residence issued by Colombia and Chile..

Montenegro.notes: 30 days visa free if hold a valid issued by the Schengen area, Australia, Japan, Canada, New Zealand, Ireland, the United States or the United Kingdom.

Morocco.notes: May apply for an e-Visa if holding a valid visa or a residency document issued by one of the following countries: Schengen Area, Australia, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand, United Kingdom, United States a residency document issued by Cyprus, Japan, United Arab Emirates..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy not required.. May transit without visa if transit is through Auckland Airport and for no longer than 24 hours, subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

North Macedonia.notes: 15 days visa free if Hold a valid Type "C" multiple-entry visa for the Schengen Area or a temporary/permanent residence permit of an EU Member State or a country signatory of the Schengen Agreement.

San Marino.notes: San Marino imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossing with Italy, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Tourist visa on arrival for holders of a valid multiple entry visa from US, UK or Schengen area, under the condition that the multiple entry visa has been used at least once, proving that by showing the entry and exit stamps of the country of issuance..

Serbia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. Transfers allowed.. 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa or pernamnet residence of the Cyprus, Ireland, Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or the United States.

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Turkmenistan.notes: When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

Vatican City.notes: Vatican imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossing with Italy, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..

Venezuela.notes: Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers..

Vietnam.notes: 30 days visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island..

Yemen.notes: Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Albania.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid multiple-entry Schengen, UK or US visa has been previously used once or residence permit of Schengen, UK, US or UAE 10 years..

Andorra.notes: Andorra imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossings with France or Spain, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 30 days visa free if hold a valid multiple entry visa or resident permit of the European Union, Schengen Area member states, and United States.

El Salvador.notes: In cases where a visa cannot be issued due to unexpected circumstances or force majeure, visitors may apply for a visa through the Special Entry Permit (PEI).. 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

Guatemala.notes: 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

Honduras.notes: 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa issued by Canada, the United States or a Schengen member state..

Mexico.notes: 180 days visa free if hold both a valid visa or permanent residence issued by Canada, Schengen Area, Japan, the United Kingdom or the United States, and only permanent residence issued by Colombia and Chile..

Montenegro.notes: 30 days visa free if hold a valid issued by the Schengen area, Australia, Japan, Canada, New Zealand, Ireland, the United States or the United Kingdom.

North Macedonia.notes: 15 days visa free if Hold a valid Type "C" multiple-entry visa for the Schengen Area or a temporary/permanent residence permit of an EU Member State or a country signatory of the Schengen Agreement.

San Marino.notes: San Marino imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossing with Italy, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Tourist visa on arrival for holders of a valid multiple entry visa from US, UK or Schengen area, under the condition that the multiple entry visa has been used at least once, proving that by showing the entry and exit stamps of the country of issuance..

Serbia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. Transfers allowed.. 90 days visa free if hold a valid visa or pernamnet residence of the Cyprus, Ireland, Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or the United States.

Vatican City.notes: Vatican imposes no visa requirements on its visitors, however entry is only possible through land border crossing with Italy, multiple entry Schengen area visa required..
